candidate_problems.text: What is the minimal underlying invariant structure from which quantum state, causal relation, and geometry all emerge as different projections, and what exact reconstruction map yields Hilbert-space quantum mechanics plus Lorentzian spacetime in appropriate limits?

How can observables, dynamics, and probability be defined in a fully background-independent theory with no external time—i.e., what replaces the standard state-evolution picture, and how do locality, measurement, and decoherence arise when causal structure itself can be indefinite or dynamical?

What concrete mechanism makes classical spacetime and Einstein dynamics emerge from a more primitive relational/algebraic substrate while also explaining horizon entropy, singularity resolution, and ultraviolet finiteness without reintroducing hidden background structure?
